Title: User Registration - Personal Account
Steps: cleared cache/cookies"
Assertions: email=testuser-{{timestamp}}@example.com, password=TestP@ss123!, front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Cross_Layer_Checks:
1. Navigate to storefront homepage
2. Click 'Sign Up' in header
3. Select 'Personal' account type
4. Fill required fields: First Name, Last Name, Email: testuser-{timestamp}@example.com, Password: TestP@ss123!
5. Accept terms and conditions
6. Click 'Create Account' button
7. Verify confirmation page displays
Failure_Signals:
- Registration form submits successfully
- Confirmation page displays success message
- User can sign in with new credentials
- Account visible in Admin panel under Customers
- Profile displays correct personal information
Cleanup:
[ADMIN] new user appears in Customers list
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during registration
References: Spinner visible >5s, 4xx/5xx on network tab, console TypeError, page redirect to /error

Title: User Registration - Organization Account

Assertions:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Select 'Organization' account type
3. Fill required fields: Company Name, Admin name, Email, Password
4. Accept terms and conditions
5. Click 'Create Account'
6. Log in with new credentials
7. Verify organization context
Cross_Layer_Checks:
- Organization account created successfully
- Company appears in Organizations list in Admin
- User assigned as organization administrator
- Organization name visible in storefront header
- B2B features accessible: Company Members, Quick Order

[ADMIN] organization appears in Organizations list
[CONSOLE] no JS errors

Title: Sign In - Personal User
Assertions:
- User authenticated successfully
- User name displayed in header
- Cart icon accessible
- Account menu shows Logout option
- No error messages displayed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on sign-in
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on auth requests
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s, 4xx/5xx on /connect/token, console TypeError, redirect to /error

Title: Sign In - Organization User
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Enter organization user email and password
3. Click 'Sign In'
4. Verify organization context active
5. Check B2B features available
Assertions:
- User logged in with organization context
- Organization name visible in header
- B2B features accessible: Quick Order, Company Members, Quotes
- Pricing reflects organization contracts if configured
- Cart specific to organization (BL-B2B-001)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] xAPI cart query returns org-scoped cart
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s, 4xx/5xx on auth, console TypeError

Title: Forgot Password - Reset Flow
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Click 'Forgot Password?' link
3. Enter registered email address
4. Click 'Send Reset Link'
5. Check email for password reset link
6. Click reset link and enter new password
7. Log in with new password
8. Verify old password no longer works
Assertions:
- Reset link email received within 2 minutes
- Password reset form accepts strong passwords
- Password reset completes with confirmation message
- Can sign in with new password; old password rejected
- Reset link expires after use (BL-AUTH-003)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[EMAIL] reset email received within 2 minutes
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s, email not received after 5 min, console TypeError

Title: Sign Out and Session Revocation
Steps:
1. Click user name / avatar in top header to open account-menu popup (BL-AUTH-007 — no /sign-out page, no header-level logout icon)
2. Click Logout button inside popup (data-testid="main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")
3. Verify sign-out completed (redirect to home or /sign-in)
4. Attempt to access {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders directly
Assertions:
- User signed out successfully
- Account menu no longer shows user name
- Attempting account pages redirects to sign-in
- Session token revoked (protected API calls return 401)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] /account/orders redirects to sign-in (not 200)
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Session still active after sign-out, 4xx/5xx errors, console TypeError

Title: Account Lockout After Failed Login Attempts
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Enter correct email with wrong password 5 times in succession
3. Attempt 6th login with correct credentials
4. Verify lockout behavior
Assertions:
- Account locked after N consecutive failures (platform default: 5)
- Even correct credentials rejected during lockout with generic message
- Lockout message does not reveal whether account exists
- Successful login prior to threshold resets failure counter (BL-AUTH-003)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 5xx on repeated login attempts
Failure_Signals: Account not locked after 5 failures, 500 error on login attempt, console TypeError
Cleanup: Wait for lockout expiry OR use dedicated test account

Title: Catalog Browsing - Category Navigation
Steps:
1. Navigate to main catalog from header menu
2. Hover over main category
3. Verify subcategories display
4. Click on subcategory
5. Verify category page loads
6. Check breadcrumbs and product listing
Assertions:
- Main categories load in header/menu
- Subcategories display on hover/click
- Category page loads with correct products
- Breadcrumbs show correct hierarchy
- Product count displayed
- Facets/filters display in sidebar
- Products show image, name, price, Add to Cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on category nav
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on catalog API calls
Failure_Signals: Category menu blank, 404 on category page, console TypeError, spinner >5s

Title: Catalog - Faceted Filters (Multi-Filter Apply)
Preconditions: "User on category page with filterable products"
Steps:
1. Navigate to category page
2. Verify facets display (Brand, Price, Size, Color)
3. Select Brand filter
4. Verify results update and count changes
5. Apply Price range filter
6. Verify chip badges show active filters
7. Click X on one chip to remove it
8. Verify no-results case with conflicting filters
Assertions:
- Facets display available values
- Applying filter updates product listing immediately
- Product count updates after each filter
- Multiple filters work together (AND logic)
- Chip badges display for active filters
- Removing chip updates results
- Facet counts match filtered results (BL-SRCH-001)
- Empty state shows 'No products match' message
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter requests
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Facets not loading, product count not updating, console TypeError, spinner >5s

Title: Catalog - Sort Products
Preconditions: "User on category page with multiple products"
Steps:
1. Navigate to category page
2. Select 'Price: Low to High' in sort dropdown
3. Verify products sorted ascending
4. Select 'Price: High to Low'
5. Verify descending sort
6. Apply a filter and verify sort persists
Assertions:
- Sort options available: Price (Low-High, High-Low), Name (A-Z, Z-A), Newest
- Sorting applies immediately
- Sort order maintained after filter applied (ECL-3.2)
- Pagination resets to page 1 on sort change
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on sort change
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: Sort not persisting with filter, console TypeError, spinner >5s

Title: Product Search - Basic Query and Suggestions
Steps: front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Assertions:
1. Click on search bar in header
2. Start typing 'lapt'
3. Verify autocomplete suggestions appear
4. Press Enter to search 'laptop'
5. Verify search results page loads with result count
6. Verify filters available to refine
Cross_Layer_Checks:
- Suggestions update after 2-3 characters
- Search results page displays matching products
- Result count shown
- Products display with image, name, price, Add to Cart
- Filters available on search results
- Breadcrumbs: Home > Search Results (BL-SRCH-004)
Failure_Signals:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on search
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on search API
Cleanup: Autocomplete not appearing, 0 results for common term, console TypeError

Title: Product Search - No Results Handling
Steps:
1. Enter nonsense search term: 'xyzabc123notfound'
2. Press Enter
3. Verify no results handling
4. Verify search term visible in bar
Assertions:
- 'No results found for xyzabc123notfound' message shown
- Suggestions shown: 'Try different keywords' or 'Browse categories'
- Page layout intact (no broken grid)
- Search bar filled with term
- No 500 errors (BL-SRCH-002)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 5xx on no-results search
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: 500 error on no-results query, console TypeError, blank page

Title: Product Search - Special Characters and XSS
Steps:
1. Enter: '<script>alert()</script>' in search
2. Press Enter
3. Enter: 'laptop & monitor'
4. Verify search handles both queries
Assertions:
- XSS attempts sanitized (no script execution)
- Special characters handled gracefully
- No server errors
- Query escaped in URL (BL-SRCH-005)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no alert() dialogs, no script execution
[NETWORK] no 5xx errors
Failure_Signals: Script executing (alert dialog), 500 on special char query

Title: Search Index Lag - Admin Change Reflects Within 120s
Steps: admin_url={{BACK_URL}}, front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Assertions:
1. Update product name in Admin
2. Immediately search on storefront (may show old name - expected within 60s)
3. Verify direct product URL shows new name immediately
4. Wait 120 seconds
5. Re-run search
6. Verify new name appears in results
Cross_Layer_Checks:
- PDP (direct URL) shows updated name immediately (live data)
- Search results update within 120s after reindex
- After 120s no stale data remains (BL-CAT-003, BL-CROSS-009)
Failure_Signals:
[ADMIN] product shows new name immediately in Admin
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Cleanup: Stale data persisting beyond 120s, PDP showing stale data, console TypeError
References: Restore original product name in Admin

Title: Add to Cart - From Product Page
Steps: sku={{TEST_SKU}}, front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Assertions:
1. Navigate to product detail page
2. Verify product details load (name, image, price)
3. Verify quantity selector defaults to 1
4. Click 'Add to Cart'
5. Verify success notification
6. Verify cart icon count increments
Cross_Layer_Checks:
- Product detail page loads fully
- 'Add to Cart' button enabled (if in stock)
- Success notification shows product name
- Cart icon count increments
- Product visible in cart
Cleanup: Spinner >5s, errors[] non-empty in addItem, cart badge unchanged after 3s, 4xx/5xx on /graphql
References: Remove item from cart after test

Title: Add to Cart - Product Variations (Correct SKU)
Preconditions: "Configurable product with variations. DevTools Network tab open."
Steps:
1. Navigate to product with size and color variations
2. Verify 'Add to Cart' disabled until all required options selected
3. Select Size: Medium and Color: Blue
4. Click 'Add to Cart'
5. In Network tab: locate addItem GraphQL mutation
6. Verify request payload SKU matches Blue/M variant
7. View cart and verify line item shows 'Color: Blue, Size: M'
Assertions:
- 'Add to Cart' disabled until all required attributes selected
- Selecting options enables the button
- addItem mutation sends correct variant SKU (not parent SKU)
- Cart line item displays variant attributes: 'Color: Blue, Size: M'
- Price matches selected variant
- Cart badge increments (BL-CAT-006)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addItem mutation sends correct variant SKU (not parent SKU)
[API] addItem response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: 'Add to Cart' enabled before options selected, wrong SKU in addItem, errors[] non-empty
Cleanup: Remove item from cart after test

Title: Add Same SKU Twice - Quantity Increments (No Duplicate Line)
Steps: sku={{TEST_SKU}}, front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Assertions:
1. Navigate to product detail page
2. Click 'Add to Cart' (qty=1)
3. Return to listing page
4. Add same product again
5. View cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
- Cart shows 1 line item with qty=2, not 2 separate lines
- Quantity incremented on re-add
- Line total = unit price x 2 (BL-CART-007)
Failure_Signals:
[API] cart query shows 1 line item with quantity=2 for sku={{TEST_SKU}}
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Cleanup: Two separate line items for same SKU, cart badge shows 2 items, errors[] non-empty
References: Remove item from cart after test

Title: Cart - View and Update Quantities
Steps:
1. Add 2-3 products to cart
2. Navigate to full cart page
3. Verify cart displays all items with image, name, SKU, qty, line total
4. Click '+' to increase quantity of one item
5. Verify line total and subtotal recalculate
6. Click '-' to decrease quantity
7. Decrease to 0 and verify item removed
Assertions:
- Full cart shows all items with image, name, qty selector, line total
- Subtotal, shipping placeholder, grand total displayed
- Line total = unit price x quantity (BL-PRICE-008)
- Subtotal updates on quantity change
- Decreasing to 0 removes item or minus button disabled at 1
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[MATH] line total = unit price × quantity for each item
[MATH] sum(line totals) = displayed subtotal
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Line total not updating, subtotal mismatch, console TypeError, spinner >5s

Title: Cart - Remove Item
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click remove/trash icon on one item
3. Verify item removed
4. Verify totals recalculate
5. Remove all items and verify empty state
Assertions:
- Item disappears from cart immediately
- Cart totals recalculate
- If cart empty: 'Your cart is empty' message with continue shopping link
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] cart query confirms item removed (not in cart.items)
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Item still visible after remove click, totals not updating, spinner >5s

Title: Cart - Stock Limit Enforced (Max Qty = Available Stock)
Steps: front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Assertions:
1. Navigate to product with limited stock
2. Enter quantity 999 in quantity input field
3. Attempt to add to cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
- Quantity capped to available stock or error shown: 'Only X available'
- Order cannot exceed available inventory
- '+' button disabled at stock limit (BL-CART-001)
Failure_Signals:
[API] addToCart mutation rejects quantity exceeding stock OR returns capped qty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Cleanup: Qty 999 accepted without error, order placed exceeding stock, spinner >5s

Title: Cart - Out-of-Stock Product Cannot Be Added
Preconditions: "Admin access. Product with all FFC inventory set to 0."
Steps:
1. In Admin: set all fulfillment center stock to 0 for a product
2. Navigate to product on storefront
3. Observe stock label and Add to Cart button
4. Attempt to add via xAPI if UI blocks
Assertions:
- 'Out of stock' or 'Sold out' label shown on PDP and listing
- 'Add to Cart' disabled/hidden
- xAPI addToCart returns error for zero-stock product (BL-CAT-001)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addToCart mutation returns error for zero-stock item
[ADMIN] product stock shows 0 in Admin inventory
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: 'Add to Cart' enabled for zero-stock product, no out-of-stock label, 5xx on addToCart

Title: Cart - Price N/A Prevents Purchase ($0 Guard)
Preconditions: "Admin access. Product with price removed or set to 0."
Steps:
1. In Admin: remove price from product (delete price list entry)
2. Navigate to product on storefront
3. Observe price and Add to Cart state
Assertions:
- Product shows 'Unavailable' or N/A price — NOT $0.00
- 'Add to Cart' button disabled
- Product cannot be purchased at $0 (BL-CROSS-001, BL-CROSS-012)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] xAPI products query returns null price for this product
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Product shows $0.00, 'Add to Cart' enabled with no price, 5xx on product query

Title: Cart - Promo Code Valid Application
Steps: front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Assertions:
1. Add products to cart
2. Navigate to cart
3. Enter valid code: SAVE10
4. Click 'Apply'
5. Verify discount applied
6. Verify discount calculated on sale price not list price
Cross_Layer_Checks:
- Valid code applies discount
- Discount line appears: 'Promo Code (SAVE10): -$X.XX'
- Percentage coupon applies to already-discounted (sale) price, not list price
- Grand total reduced correctly (BL-CART-003, BL-PRICE-001)
Failure_Signals:
[API] cart query shows coupon applied and correct discount amount
[MATH] discount amount = coupon% × sale price (not list price)
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Cleanup: Discount calculated on list price, no discount line visible, errors[] non-empty in cart mutation

Title: Cart - Invalid Promo Code Rejected
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Enter invalid code: INVALID123
3. Click 'Apply'
4. Verify error
Assertions:
- Error message: 'Invalid promo code' or 'Code not found'
- No discount applied
- Cart totals unchanged
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 5xx on invalid coupon submit
Failure_Signals: No error shown for invalid code, discount applied with invalid code

Title: Cart - Pack Size Validation
Steps:
1. Navigate to product with pack size = 6
2. Enter quantity = 7
3. Attempt to add to cart
Assertions:
- Quantity rejected or auto-rounded to nearest pack (6 or 12)
- Stepper increments by pack size (BL-CART-006)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] addToCart mutation rejects or rounds non-multiple quantity
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Qty 7 accepted for pack-size-6 product, stepper increments by 1

Title: Cart - Currency Switch Recalculates All Prices
Steps:
1. Add items to cart in USD
2. Switch currency to EUR (or other configured currency)
3. Verify all cart line items recalculate to EUR prices
4. Verify shipping and tax also in EUR
5. Check a product not in new currency's price list
Assertions:
- All prices switch to new currency's price list (not exchange rate conversion)
- Cart subtotal, shipping, tax all in new currency
- Products without new-currency prices show 'Unavailable' or removed
- No mixed-currency state in cart (BL-CART-004, BL-CROSS-004)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] cart query after currency switch shows all prices in new currency
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Mixed-currency display, products without new-currency price show $0, errors[] non-empty

Title: Cart - Persistence Across Sign-Out / Sign-In
Preconditions: "User logged in with items in cart"
Steps:
1. Add 3 products to cart
2. Sign out via account-menu popup (click user name in top header → Logout; BL-AUTH-007; data-testid="main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")
3. Sign back in
4. Verify cart restored
Assertions:
- Cart restored with same items and quantities after re-login
- No items lost on sign-out/sign-in cycle (BL-CART-008)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] cart query after re-login shows same items and quantities
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Cart empty after re-login, items lost, quantities changed

Title: Checkout - Standard Delivery - Full Flow
Steps: email={{USER_EMAIL}}, password={{USER_PASSWORD}}, front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Assertions:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click 'Checkout'
3. Select 'Delivery' option
4. Select or add shipping address
5. Select shipping method
6. Select payment method
7. Review order summary
8. Click 'Place Order'
9. Verify order confirmation page
Cross_Layer_Checks:
- Checkout page loads with progress indicator
- Address form or selector displays
- Shipping methods display with cost and estimated delivery
- Payment methods available
- Order summary shows: Items, Subtotal, Shipping, Tax, Grand Total
- Grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discounts (BL-CHK-006)
- Order processes successfully
- Confirmation page displays order number
- Cart cleared after order
Failure_Signals:
[MATH] grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discounts
[ADMIN] order appears in Admin with correct total
[EMAIL] confirmation email received within 5 minutes
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Cleanup: Order not created, confirmation page not loading, errors[] non-empty, 4xx/5xx on place order

Title: Checkout - BOPIS Pickup Location Selection

Title: Checkout - Shipping Methods Update on Address Change

2. Note available shipping methods and rates
3. Change to international address
4. Verify shipping methods refresh
5. Verify previously selected method deselected if unavailable

Title: Checkout - Free Shipping Threshold Recalculates on Cart Change
Steps: front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Assertions:
1. Add items totaling $90 to cart
2. Note shipping cost ($10 standard)
3. Add item worth $20 (total $110)
4. Verify shipping becomes $0 (free)
5. Apply coupon reducing total to $95
6. Verify free shipping removed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
- Shipping recalculates each time cart changes
- Free shipping triggered at threshold on subtotal after discounts
- Coupon reducing below threshold removes free shipping (BL-SHIP-003)
Failure_Signals:
[MATH] shipping = $0 when subtotal >= threshold
[MATH] shipping restored when coupon drops subtotal below threshold
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Cleanup: Free shipping not triggering at threshold, shipping not removed when below threshold

Title: Checkout - Order Total Formula Verified
Preconditions: "User at final checkout review step before placing order"
Steps:
1. Proceed through all checkout steps
2. At order review page, manually calculate: sum(line totals) + shipping + tax - discounts
3. Compare manual calculation to displayed grand total
4. After placing order, compare to confirmation page total
5. Verify Admin order shows same total
Assertions:
- Grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax - cart discounts exactly
- Tax calculated on post-discount subtotal (BL-PRICE-002)
- No unexplained discrepancies >= $0.01 (BL-PRICE-008, BL-CHK-006)
- Checkout total matches confirmation page
- Confirmation matches Admin order detail
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[MATH] grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discounts (manual calculation)
[ADMIN] admin order total = checkout total
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: $0.01+ discrepancy in total calculation, checkout total differs from confirmation, admin order amount different

Title: Checkout - Place Order (Double-Submit Prevention)
Preconditions: "User at final checkout step with payment ready"
Steps:
1. Complete all checkout steps
2. Click 'Place Order'
3. Immediately click 'Place Order' again (rapid double-click)
4. Wait for processing
5. Check Admin for orders
Assertions:
- Only 1 order created (not 2)
- Button disabled/loading state after first click
- No duplicate orders in Admin
- No double inventory decrement (BL-CHK-002, BL-CROSS-010)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] only 1 order created for this cart
[NETWORK] only 1 order creation API call sent
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: Two orders created, button clickable during processing, double inventory decrement

[CONSOLE] no JS errors, no card data in console logs

Title: Payment - Skyflow Valid Card (PCI Tokenization Cart-Embedded)
Preconditions: "Logged in user; items in cart; Skyflow configured with AllowCartPayment=true (VCST-5009)"
Steps:
1. Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select 'Bank card (Skyflow)'; if 'Select credit card' dropdown appears select 'Add new card'
2. Fill Card number '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)'; Expiration date '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)'; Security code '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)'
3. Click 'Place order' inline on /cart (no redirect to /checkout/payment)
Assertions:
- Skyflow secure form loads INLINE on /cart (not on /checkout/payment)
- Card data tokenized by Skyflow (js.skyflow.com v2.7.7) before submission

Title: Security - RBAC: Unauthorized Action Blocked (Admin)
Preconditions: "Admin user with restricted role (read-only on Catalog)"
Steps:
1. Create role with only 'read' permission on Catalog
2. Assign to user and sign in as that user in Admin
3. Verify Create and Delete buttons absent in Catalog blade
4. Attempt POST /api/catalog/products directly
5. Add 'create' permission
6. Verify button appears
Assertions:
- Create/Delete buttons absent for read-only role
- Direct API call returns 403 Forbidden
- Adding permission makes button appear
- Zero-permission escalation possible via UI (BL-AUTH-005)

[API] POST /api/catalog/products returns 403 for read-only role
[ADMIN] Create/Delete buttons absent in Catalog blade
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Failure_Signals: 403 not returned for unauthorized API call, buttons visible for unauthorized role

Title: Pricing — Floating-Point Arithmetic: Multi-Item Cart Subtotal Exact Match
Preconditions: "Products with prices that create floating-point edge cases (e.g.
Assertions: $0.10) available in catalog."
Cross_Layer_Checks: front_url={{FRONT_URL}}, sku1={{TEST_SKU}}, sku2=TEST_SKU_2, sku3=TEST_SKU_3
Failure_Signals:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] add Product A (price $19.99, qty 3) to cart
[WAIT] cart badge increments
[ACT] add Product B (price $7.33, qty 2) to cart
[WAIT] cart badge increments
[ACT] add Product C (price $0.10, qty 1) to cart
[WAIT] cart badge increments
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads with all 3 items
Cleanup:
[MATH] Product A line total = $19.99 × 3 = $59.97
[MATH] Product B line total = $7.33 × 2 = $14.66
[MATH] Product C line total = $0.10 × 1 = $0.10
[MATH] manual sum = $59.97 + $14.66 + $0.10 = $74.73
[DOM] displayed subtotal = $74.73 (exact match, no $0.01 discrepancy) (BL-PRICE-008)
[FORMAT] all prices display with exactly 2 decimal places
References:
[API] xAPI cart query returns lineTotal values that sum exactly to cartSubtotal
[MATH] sum(cart.items[].extendedPrice) = cart.subTotal in API response
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
Automation_Status: Subtotal differs from manual sum by $0.01+, price displaying with 1 or 3 decimal places, penny discrepancy between line totals and subtotal
